robot.notes: UR controller IP address. Set --robot-ip to override.

gripper.notes: threshold > 0.5 = closed, < 0.5 = open. Tune per your gripper response.

cam_global.notes: RealSense D435i/D455 serial. Leave null to auto-detect (first device).

cam_wrist.notes: RealSense D435i/D455 serial. Leave null to auto-detect (second device).

safety.notes: Max per-step joint jump (radians). If exceeded, holds previous target. ~0.10 rad ≈ 5.7°

control.notes: All in SI units. Passed to UR's servoJ.

policy.notes: device: 'cuda' or 'cpu'. checkpoint_path can be overridden via --policy-path.

task.notes: Must match one of the task strings in the training dataset. Override with --task.

rollout.notes: max_seconds: hard cutoff for safety. dry_run: prints actions without sending to robot.
